2604.17897.title: LoReC: Rethinking Large Language Models for Graph Data Analysis
2604.17897.paper_summary: The advent of Large Language Models (LLMs) has fundamentally reshaped the way we interact with graphs, giving rise to a new paradigm called GraphLLM. As revealed in recent studies, graph learning can benefit from LLMs. However, we observe limited benefits when we directly utilize LLMs to make predictions for graph-related tasks within GraphLLM paradigm, which even yields suboptimal results compared to conventional GNN-based approaches. Through in-depth analysis, we find this failure can be attributed to LLMs' limited capability for processing graph data and their tendency to overlook graph information. To address this issue, we propose LoReC (Look, Remember, and Contrast), a novel plug-and-play method for GraphLLM paradigm, which enhances LLM's understanding of graph data through three stages: (1) Look: redistributing attention to graph; (2) Remember: re-injecting graph information into the Feed-Forward Network (FFN); (3) Contrast: rectifying the vanilla logits produced in the decoding process. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LoReC brings notable improvements over current GraphLLM methods and outperforms GNN-based approaches across diverse datasets. The implementation is available at https://github.com/Git-King-Zhan/LoReC.
2604.17897.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）的出現從根本上改變了我們與圖形互動的方式，催生了一種名為GraphLLM的新範式。最近的研究顯示，圖形學習可以從LLMs中受益。然而，我們觀察到在GraphLLM範式中，當我們直接利用LLMs對圖形相關任務進行預測時，所獲得的好處有限，甚至相較於傳統的基於GNN的方法，結果也不理想。通過深入分析，我們發現這一失敗可以歸因於LLMs在處理圖形數據方面的能力有限，以及它們傾向於忽略圖形信息。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了LoReC（Look, Remember, and Contrast），這是一種新穎的即插即用方法，旨在增強LLM對圖形數據的理解，分為三個階段：（1）Look：重新分配對圖形的注意力；（2）Remember：將圖形信息重新注入到前饋網絡（FFN）中；（3）Contrast：修正解碼過程中產生的原始logits。大量實驗表明，LoReC在當前GraphLLM方法上帶來了顯著的改進，並在多個數據集上超越了基於GNN的方法。實現可在https://github.com/Git-King-Zhan/LoReC獲得。
2604.17897.author: Hongyu Zhan et.al.
2604.17897.authors: Hongyu Zhan, Qixin Wang, Yusen Tan, Haitao Yu, Jingbo Zhou, Shuai Chen, Jia Li, Xiao Tan, Jun Xia
